frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; valid semver; description 501 chars folded (well under 1024). The > at L4 is YAML scalar style marker (permitted by frontmatter-spec). allowed-tools hyphenated. composes_with includes archived git-branch-cleanup — broken cross-skill reference.

description_quality.notes: Action verb (Guide for creating), 9 keyword variants, proactive trigger statement. 501 chars (folded) under ceiling.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 121 lines / ~476 words. No references/ directory (correct — tight reference card). All content fits atomically.

instruction_clarity.notes: Numbered sections with imperative voice. Allowed Types table explicit and bounded. Multiple worked examples. Quick Checklist summarizes rules. Anti-Pattern callout explicit.

coordination.notes: composes_with [git-pr, git-branch-cleanup] — git-branch-cleanup is archived (now git-post-merge-cleanup). 1 of 2 composed skills is broken. Should also include git-pr-feedback.

completeness.notes: All content self-contained. No reference files needed. Examples concrete. Quick Checklist captures rules. No dead links in body.

anti_patterns.notes: Explicit Anti-Pattern callout forbids amending without permission, with rationale. Imperative voice. No emojis. No excessive MUST/NEVER. Branch naming has '3-5 meaningful words' guidance preventing both extremes.

critical.fix: Change to composes_with: ['git-pr', 'git-post-merge-cleanup', 'git-pr-feedback'] — git-post-merge-cleanup is the active replacement.

nits.fix: Change to [] (skill operates via git commands, not file reads) or ['./'].

nits.item: Description uses > folded scalar with line breaks that have no semantic meaning
nits.fix: Stylistic — consider | block scalar or single line for clarity.

nits.item: Fenced code block at L29 tagged 'text' instead of a syntax-aware language
nits.fix: Tag as 'gitcommit' or 'markdown' for better rendering.

nits.item: Merge Strategy default ('squash merge') is a workflow assumption
nits.fix: Append '; check the repo's CONTRIBUTING.md if it disagrees.'

top_fixes.fix: Replace archived git-branch-cleanup with git-post-merge-cleanup in composes_with
Add a note that Merge Strategy default is repo-conventional
